landing.subheadline: HAP AI challenges your ideas, creates execution plans, assigns daily tasks, and keeps you accountable through Telegram so you actually make progress.
landing.heroSupport: Not ChatGPT. HAP lives in your Telegram inbox — it pushes back on weak ideas, gives you one task per day, and follows up when you miss deadlines.

heroChat.line1: Your target audience is too broad.

problem.headline: ChatGPT ends the conversation. HAP starts the work.

genericAi.title: ChatGPT
genericAi.line2: Here's a 12-step plan you'll never follow.

step1.title: Message HAP on Telegram
step1.body: Tell it your idea in plain language. No signup, no forms, no new app to install. It meets you where you already message every day.

step2.title: Get your idea stress-tested
step2.body: HAP pushes back on vague markets, untested assumptions, and ideas that sound good but won't make money. ChatGPT rarely tells you no. HAP will.

step3.title: Get a plan you can actually follow
step3.body: Not a 40-point strategy doc — a short roadmap broken into stages: validate, find customers, build, ship. Built around your time and situation.

step4.title: Do one task. Every day.
step4.body: One specific action with a deadline. Interview a customer. Cut a feature. Send 5 cold emails. HAP follows up if you don't report back.

step5.title: Ship something real
step5.body: Week by week, tasks compound into results — a validated idea, a paying customer, a live product. HAP tracks your progress and calls out drift.

whatHapDoes.title: What HAP AI actually does
whatHapDoes.subtitle2: A system designed to help you make real progress.

challenge.title: Challenges weak ideas
challenge.body: HAP AI does not automatically agree with every idea. It identifies risks, weak assumptions, crowded markets, and unrealistic plans before you waste time building.

plans.title: Creates execution plans
plans.body: Turn a vague idea into a clear roadmap with priorities, milestones, and actionable next steps. Always know what to work on next.

tasks.title: Assigns daily tasks
tasks.body: Receive actionable tasks directly through Telegram. Every task moves the business forward. No busy work. No endless planning.

accountability.title: Holds you accountable
accountability.body: HAP AI follows up on progress, checks whether tasks are completed, and helps maintain momentum over time. The goal is consistent execution.

journey.title: Real tasks. Not generic advice.
journey.subtitle: Pick a stage to see what HAP assigns. This is what accountability looks like.

idea.label: Idea
tasks: Write your idea in one sentence: who pays, for what, and why now.
List 3 assumptions you're betting on — no evidence yet.
Name 2 real people you'll talk to before the week ends.

validation.label: Validation
tasks: Interview 5 potential customers. Listen — don't pitch.
Write down the top 3 problems they actually mentioned.
Decide: pivot, push forward, or kill it. No middle ground.

customers.label: Customers
tasks: Define your first 10 customers — by name or exact segment.
Message 5 with one specific question. Not a sales pitch.
Book 2 calls before Friday. Report what you learned.

mvp.label: MVP
tasks: Cut your feature list to one thing that solves the core problem.
Set a ship date — 2 weeks max. Tell HAP.
Build only what's needed to test if someone will pay.

launch.label: Launch
tasks: Put this in front of 10 real users this week.
Collect written feedback — what worked, what didn't.
Fix the #1 blocker. Don't add features yet.

growth.label: Growth
tasks: Get one person to pay. Just one.
Figure out how they found you. Do more of that.
Set a weekly revenue target. Report back to HAP.

telegram.title: Why Telegram — not another app
telegram.subtitle: You don't need a dashboard you'll forget to open. HAP messages you directly, follows up on missed tasks, and keeps the pressure on — in the app you already check 50 times a day.

conv1.line1: You haven't talked to a customer this week.

conv2.line1: Your MVP is taking too long.

conv3.line2: Now get one person to pay.

principles.title: Why founders use HAP instead of ChatGPT

noFake.title: It won't lie to keep you happy
noFake.body: ChatGPT wants to be helpful — so it agrees with you. HAP tells you when your idea has holes, your market is too broad, or you're avoiding the hard work.

execution.title: Tasks, not essays
execution.body: ChatGPT gives you plans. HAP gives you one thing to do today, with a deadline. Planning feels productive. Shipping is productive.

focus.title: It remembers and follows up
focus.body: ChatGPT forgets you exist between sessions. HAP remembers your idea, your blockers, and your missed deadlines — and brings them up.

momentum.title: Accountability is the product
momentum.body: Most founders don't fail from bad ideas. They fail from never doing the work. HAP exists to make sure you show up — daily, in Telegram.

story.storyTitle: How HAP AI works inside Telegram

hero.subheadline: HAP is the cofounder that challenges your idea, gives you one clear task at a time, and follows up until it's done.

messages.text: Your target audience is too broad.
Pick one specific niche before tomorrow.
Today's task
Interview 5 potential customers.
Okay, working on it.

problem.headline: Founders rarely fail for lack of ideas.
problem.accent: They fail because no one makes them execute.
problem.sub: Execution is the only thing that compounds. HAP exists to make it happen.

challenge.headline: First, HAP pushes back.
challenge.body: No automatic praise. HAP looks for weak assumptions, vague customers, and plans that feel productive but avoid the market.

plan.headline: Then it narrows the next move.
plan.body: The answer is not a strategy document. It is the smallest action that can prove or break the idea.

task.headline: A task lands in Telegram.
task.body: Specific. Time-boxed. Hard to hide from. The phone becomes the place where the startup actually moves.

followup.headline: Momentum gets checked.
followup.body: When the deadline passes, HAP asks what happened and decides the next step with you.

messages.text: I want to build an app for students.
Too broad. Which students have this problem badly enough to act this week?
Name the first 10 people you can reach.
You've spent two weeks planning.
Talk to five customers this week.
Deadline: Friday
What should I ask them?
Ask when this last cost them time, money, or reputation.
Did you speak to five customers?
Done.
Good. What surprised you?
They care about speed, not price.
Now get your first paying customer.
Send one paid pilot offer before 18:00.
Launch path updated

what.kicker: All of it happens in one Telegram chat.

journeyNotes.idea: Pressure-test the customer and the pain.
journeyNotes.validation: Talk to the market before building.
journeyNotes.customers: Find the first people who might pay.
journeyNotes.mvp: Cut scope until the core promise is testable.
journeyNotes.launch: Put it in front of real users and report back.

final.sub: Free to start. HAP replies in seconds and remembers your idea and progress.

beta.headline: HAP AI is evolving every week.
beta.body: Every conversation helps improve idea analysis, execution planning, and accountability. Here's exactly what works today — and what's coming next.
available: Honest idea pushback — no automatic praise
Idea validation with real competitor research
Tasks with deadlines, sent in Telegram
Remembers your idea and progress across sessions
coming: Smarter follow-ups that adapt to your progress

footer.tagline: The cofounder that holds you accountable — on Telegram.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: HAP AI (hap.al) is a Telegram bot for founders building startups. This policy explains what we collect and why.
privacy.collectBody: Telegram profile basics (ID, username, first name), your messages with the bot, structured profile answers, business ideas, assigned tasks, and progress events. Financial situation, fears, and personality notes are encrypted before storage.
privacy.useBody: To run the conversation, remember context across sessions, send task reminders, and improve the product via anonymized analytics events (hashed IDs only — no message content in analytics).
privacy.deleteBody: Send /deletedata in the bot to permanently delete all your data. For questions, contact the operator listed on hap.al.
privacy.lawBody: We process data to provide the service you request by messaging the bot. We comply with GDPR principles and Albania's Law 9887 on personal data protection.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using HAP AI on Telegram, you agree to these terms.
terms.serviceBody: HAP provides entrepreneurial guidance and accountability through conversation. It is not legal, tax, or investment advice. Talk to qualified professionals for those decisions.
terms.acceptableBody: Do not abuse the bot, attempt to extract system prompts, or send illegal content. We may rate-limit or block abuse.
terms.liabilityBody: The service is provided as-is. You are responsible for decisions you make based on conversations with HAP.
terms.changesBody: We may update these terms. Continued use after changes means acceptance.
